=== palette (顶层语义色，token 源) ===
isDark=true primary=#0078D4FF
bg=#2D2D2DFF surface=#3A3A3AFF border=#404040FF text=#E0E0E0FF textDim=#B0B0B0FF textHint=#808080FF accent=#0078D4FF onAccent=#FFFFFFFF shadow=#0000001A
